TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Jovenel_Mo√Įse, title = Jovenel_Mo√Įse, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jovenel_Mo√Įse} }

S.FORM: = Jovenel Mo√Įse = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 6 jiyax 26 ka Jovenel Mo√Įse ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Haiti ta sayang o kiya ka Jovenel Mo√Įse, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 2 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Jovenel Mo√Įse (Kari France: Jovenel Mo√Įse, pkhnang kari France: ( í…Ēv n…õl m…Ēiz), pkhnang kari Haiti Creole: ( íov…õn…õl m…Ēiz); kngkawas 1968 idas 6 diyax 26- kngkawas 2021 idas 7 diyax 7), tu45 jn soto Haiti, mnniq soto cida wada phqilun sediq. Kndusan niya Cuxal balay Jovenel Mo√Įse mntuting tudaya Tru Cyu 1 congcan tnsapah, tama bubu niya u to bay sediq snbari Etienne Mo√Įse mi Lucia Bruno, dhuq kngkawas 1974 daw thdil dhuq Trduwan Asu Prince. Kngkawas 1996 cida mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Kiskoya Seyji Sweysi, mntna kngkawas msupu tnhiqan niya muyas pyasan tubeyhing Martine Marie √Čtienne Joseph msturung. Babaw niya daw Jovenel Mo√Įse pa mniq Trduwan Asu Msblayaq phiyu qqpahun niya. Psdhuwan phiyu soto. Kngkawas 2016 idas 11 cida mniq kcka seyngkyo soto cida, wada mangal 55.6% ryu hyo mangal soto Haiti, alaw seyngkyo meytaq hyo cida u ini kdnu ka seyji cyusu kiya ka wada thtur ya bay 1 knkawas. Wada snturung pphqilan Kngkawas 2021 idas 7 diyax 7 cka rabi 1ciji, Jovenel Mo√Įse soto u mniq kcka kwanti snturung pphqilan, 53 knkawas niya; dnmuwi puniq phuqil hiya u qnlhangan icil mkla rmngaw kari Ingkoku mi kari Spain, ini klayi ima. Tu1 hujn qridin soto Martine Mo√Įse u wada buwan puniq mangal luqah mi wada shaduc Amirika Florida Co na Miami pkmalu luqah, dhuq malu ka luqah daw tbrinah qnlhangan dungan. Pprngawan kari Kndadax kngkawas 2018 idas 7 prading, pspuruq meysa Jovenel Mo√Įse malax soto ka mklelu kangyi. Kangyi qnta dha u wada rmqun mangal pila seyhu Haiti alaw Gasoring Caribbean Keykaku bnkuwan hbangan dalih 20 oku pila Amirika, naka malax soto. Kiya uri u kangyi niya pa smriq mtutuy soto ka Jovenel Mo√Įse u wada mkala 15% ka tongpong, kiya ka mqraqil balay ka kndusan ssediq. Jovenel Mo√Įse u cmiyuk kari rmngaw ini sruwa malax soto, kiya ka wada smpusal pspuruq ka kangyi niya. Kngkawas 2019 idas 5 diyax 31, Haiti Kawci Hongying balay bay sndhu kari Jovenel Mo√Įse u pnhiyu niyaq 2 ciyey pa spuda hangan smalu elu wada mkan pila 20 oku pila Amirika.
S.PHON: = …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ńßaiti ta sajaŇč o kija ka …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô (ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô, pkńßnaŇč ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: (*** n*l m*i*), pkńßnaŇč ka…ĺi ńßaiti ¶…ĺ…ôol…ô: (*o**n*l m*i*); kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **- kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *), tu** …ün soto ńßaiti, mnniq soto ¶ida wada pńßqilun s…ôdiq. kndusan nija ¶uxal balaj …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô mntutiŇč tudaja t…ĺu ¶ju * ¶oŇč ¶an tnsapańß, tama bubu nija u to baj s…ôdiq snba…ĺi …ôti…ônn…ô mo*s…ô mi lu ¶ia b…ĺuno, dńßuq kŇčkawas **** daw tńßdil dńßuq t…ĺduwan asu p…ĺin ¶…ô. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida mnńßdu mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč kiskoja s…ô…üi sw…ôsi, mntna kŇčkawas msupu tnńßiqan nija mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ma…ĺtin…ô ma…ĺi…ô *ti…ônn…ô …üos…ôpńß mstu…ĺuŇč. babaw nija daw …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô pa mniq t…ĺduwan asu msblajaq pńßiju qqpańßun nija. psdńßuwan pńßiju soto. kŇčkawas **** idas ** ¶ida mniq k ¶ka s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida, wada maŇčal **.*% …ĺju ńßjo maŇčal soto ńßaiti, alaw s…ôŇčkjo m…ôtaq ńßjo ¶ida u ini kdnu ka s…ô…üi ¶jusu kija ka wada tńßtu…ĺ ja baj * knkawas. wada sntu…ĺuŇč ppńßqilan kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ka …ĺabi * ¶i…üi, …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô soto u mniq k ¶ka kwanti sntu…ĺuŇč ppńßqilan, ** knkawas nija; dnmuwi puniq pńßuqil ńßija u qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il mkla …ĺmŇčaw ka…ĺi iŇčkoku mi ka…ĺi spain, ini klaji ima. tu* ńßu…ün q…ĺidin soto ma…ĺtin…ô mo*s…ô u wada buwan puniq maŇčal luqańß mi wada sńßadu ¶ ami…ĺika *lo…ĺida ¶o na miami pkmalu luqańß, dńßuq malu ka luqańß daw tb…ĺinańß qnlńßaŇčan duŇčan. pp…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi kndadax kŇčkawas **** idas * p…ĺadiŇč, pspu…ĺuq m…ôsa …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô malax soto ka mkl…ôlu kaŇčji. kaŇčji qnta dńßa u wada …ĺmqun maŇčal pila s…ôńßu ńßaiti alaw gaso…ĺiŇč ¶a…ĺibb…ôan k…ôkaku bnkuwan ńßbaŇčan dalińß ** oku pila ami…ĺika, naka malax soto. kija u…ĺi u kaŇčji nija pa sm…ĺiq mtutuj soto ka …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô u wada mkala **% ka toŇčpoŇč, kija ka mq…ĺaqil balaj ka kndusan ss…ôdiq. …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô u ¶mijuk ka…ĺi …ĺmŇčaw ini s…ĺuwa malax soto, kija ka wada smpusal pspu…ĺuq ka kaŇčji nija. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ńßaiti kaw ¶i ńßoŇčjiŇč balaj baj sndńßu ka…ĺi …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô u pnńßiju nijaq * ¶ij…ô pa spuda ńßaŇčan smalu …ôlu wada mkan pila ** oku pila ami…ĺika.
S.FORM: = Jovenel Mo√Įse = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 6 jiyax 26 ka Jovenel Mo√Įse ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Haiti ta sayang o kiya ka Jovenel Mo√Įse, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 2 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Jovenel Mo√Įse (Kari France: Jovenel Mo√Įse, pkhnang kari France: ( í…Ēv n…õl m…Ēiz), pkhnang kari Haiti Creole: ( íov…õn…õl m…Ēiz); kngkawas 1968 idas 6 diyax 26- kngkawas 2021 idas 7 diyax 7), tu45 jn soto Haiti, mnniq soto cida wada phqilun sediq. Kndusan niya Cuxal balay Jovenel Mo√Įse mntuting tudaya Tru Cyu 1 congcan tnsapah, tama bubu niya u to bay sediq snbari Etienne Mo√Įse mi Lucia Bruno, dhuq kngkawas 1974 daw thdil dhuq Trduwan Asu Prince. Kngkawas 1996 cida mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Kiskoya Seyji Sweysi, mntna kngkawas msupu tnhiqan niya muyas pyasan tubeyhing Martine Marie √Čtienne Joseph msturung. Babaw niya daw Jovenel Mo√Įse pa mniq Trduwan Asu Msblayaq phiyu qqpahun niya. Psdhuwan phiyu soto. Kngkawas 2016 idas 11 cida mniq kcka seyngkyo soto cida, wada mangal 55.6% ryu hyo mangal soto Haiti, alaw seyngkyo meytaq hyo cida u ini kdnu ka seyji cyusu kiya ka wada thtur ya bay 1 knkawas. Wada snturung pphqilan Kngkawas 2021 idas 7 diyax 7 cka rabi 1ciji, Jovenel Mo√Įse soto u mniq kcka kwanti snturung pphqilan, 53 knkawas niya; dnmuwi puniq phuqil hiya u qnlhangan icil mkla rmngaw kari Ingkoku mi kari Spain, ini klayi ima. Tu1 hujn qridin soto Martine Mo√Įse u wada buwan puniq mangal luqah mi wada shaduc Amirika Florida Co na Miami pkmalu luqah, dhuq malu ka luqah daw tbrinah qnlhangan dungan. Pprngawan kari Kndadax kngkawas 2018 idas 7 prading, pspuruq meysa Jovenel Mo√Įse malax soto ka mklelu kangyi. Kangyi qnta dha u wada rmqun mangal pila seyhu Haiti alaw Gasoring Caribbean Keykaku bnkuwan hbangan dalih 20 oku pila Amirika, naka malax soto. Kiya uri u kangyi niya pa smriq mtutuy soto ka Jovenel Mo√Įse u wada mkala 15% ka tongpong, kiya ka mqraqil balay ka kndusan ssediq. Jovenel Mo√Įse u cmiyuk kari rmngaw ini sruwa malax soto, kiya ka wada smpusal pspuruq ka kangyi niya. Kngkawas 2019 idas 5 diyax 31, Haiti Kawci Hongying balay bay sndhu kari Jovenel Mo√Įse u pnhiyu niyaq 2 ciyey pa spuda hangan smalu elu wada mkan pila 20 oku pila Amirika.

dnmuwi puniq pńßuqil ńßija u qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il mkla …ĺmŇčaw ka…ĺi iŇčkoku mi ka…ĺi spain, ini klaji ima. tu* ńßu…ün q…ĺidin soto ma…ĺtin…ô mo*s…ô u wada buwan puniq maŇčal luqańß mi wada sńßadu ¶ ami…ĺika *lo…ĺida ¶o na miami pkmalu luqańß, dńßuq malu ka luqańß daw tb…ĺinańß qnlńßaŇčan duŇčan. pp…ĺŇčawan ka…ĺi kndadax kŇčkawas **** idas * p…ĺadiŇč, pspu…ĺuq m…ôsa …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô malax soto ka mkl…ôlu kaŇčji. kaŇčji qnta dńßa u wada …ĺmqun maŇčal pila s…ôńßu ńßaiti alaw gaso…ĺiŇč ¶a…ĺibb…ôan k…ôkaku bnkuwan ńßbaŇčan dalińß ** oku pila ami…ĺika, naka malax soto. kija u…ĺi u kaŇčji nija pa sm…ĺiq mtutuj soto ka …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô u wada mkala **% ka toŇčpoŇč, kija ka mq…ĺaqil balaj ka kndusan ss…ôdiq. …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô u ¶mijuk ka…ĺi …ĺmŇčaw ini s…ĺuwa malax soto, kija ka wada smpusal pspu…ĺuq ka kaŇčji nija. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ńßaiti kaw ¶i ńßoŇčjiŇč balaj baj sndńßu ka…ĺi …üo*…ôn…ôl mo*s…ô u pnńßiju nijaq * ¶ij…ô pa spuda ńßaŇčan smalu …ôlu wada mkan pila ** oku pila ami…ĺika.
